title: calophyllum pentapetalum
intro: Calophyllum pentapetalum, also known as the Kanuka or Red Ironwood, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, allowing it to treat various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum pentapetalum include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
